image.prompt: A dark architectural cross-section showing load-bearing columns arranged in perfect symmetry, but one central column has begun to bow under invisible weight, creating subtle distortion in the grid above it. The structure is rendered in charcoal and deep navy with ochre highlights picking out stress points where the geometry no longer holds true. The composition emphasizes negative space around the warping column, suggesting the absence of counterforce. Matte finish, no text, abstract geometry only—the image reads as a diagram of structural failure caused not by weakness but by unchallenged assumptions about what holds things up.
